slack.title: Slack
slack.description: Search messages, read channels, and post summaries — the delivery surface for watchers, check-ins, and status updates.

gmail.title: Gmail
gmail.description: Search and read email threads for stakeholder context, briefing packs, and follow-ups.

google-drive.title: Google Drive
google-drive.description: Search, read, and fetch documents, decks, and spreadsheets from Google Drive.

atlassian.title: Atlassian
atlassian.description: Read Jira issues, plans, Confluence pages, decisions, RAID logs and delivery artefacts scoped to the user's permissions.

linear.title: Linear
linear.description: Search, read, and update Linear issues, projects, initiatives, and milestones scoped to the user's permissions.

asana.title: Asana
asana.description: Search, read, and update Asana tasks, projects, portfolios, and goals scoped to the user's permissions.

monday.title: Monday.com
monday.description: Search, read, and update monday.com boards, items, columns, and users scoped to the user's permissions.

miro.title: Miro
miro.description: Read and create board content on Miro — diagrams, strategy maps, and workshop canvases scoped to the user's permissions.

notion.title: Notion
notion.description: Search and read Notion pages and databases — planning docs and knowledge base scoped to the user's OAuth permissions.

microsoft-graph-enterprise.title: Microsoft Graph (Enterprise)
microsoft-graph-enterprise.description: Read Microsoft Entra directory and enterprise Graph context (preview). For Outlook, SharePoint, Excel, and Teams, enable Agent365 MCP in your tenant — see CONNECTORS.md.
